items.title: Capability map (high level)
items.mermaid:
mindmap
  root((Claude capabilities))
    Language
      Summarize
      Draft edit
      Q and A
    Reasoning
      Step by step
      Compare options
    Code
      Explain
      Generate
      Debug hints
    Multimodal
      Image description
    Tools API
      Custom functions
      Search integrations
items.caption: Not every branch is available on every model or plan—this is a mental map, not a feature checklist.

items.title: Tool-use loop (API)
items.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  participant App
  participant Claude
  participant Tool
  App->>Claude: user message + tool definitions
  Claude->>App: tool_use request
  App->>Tool: execute function
  Tool->>App: result JSON
  App->>Claude: tool_result message
  Claude->>App: final natural language answer
items.caption: Your application owns tool execution and security; Claude proposes calls.
